name: WrenAI
description: The open context layer that gives AI agents grounded, governed SQL across 20+ data sources, that helps you build GenBI, text-to-sql, dashboards, and advanced analytics.
summaryZh: The open context layer that gives AI agents grounded, governed SQL across 20+ data sources, that helps you build GenBI, text-to-sql, dashboards, and advanced analytics. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
